GOPRIVATE._comment: Disabled by default. Set enabled=true and provide a value (e.g. 'github.com/your-org/*') to allow Go to bypass the module proxy for private repos.

chocoLibRepair._comment: Optional repair when Chocolatey lib folder for golang exists but tools/ or tools/go/ subfolders are missing. Newer choco golang packages ship without tools/go (Go installs to C:\Program Files\Go) so this is purely cosmetic UNLESS go.exe is also missing on PATH. Modes: 'report-only' (log only), 'clean' (delete the empty/partial lib folder), 'reinstall' (uninstall then reinstall the choco package).
